popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SICILY.htm#RogerIIdied1154B as of 6/8/2016

CONSTANCE of Sicily (posthumously 2 Nov 1154-Palermo 28 Nov 1198, bur Palermo Cathedral).  The Annals of Romoald …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Costanza von Hauteville於1154年11月2日出生在勒尼 德爾 度 希希利巴勒莫時，她的父親Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile58歲，母親Beatrice of Rethel24歲。她於1186年1月27日與Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1198年11月27日在她的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Costanza von Hauteville于1154年11月2日出生在勒尼 德爾 度 希希利巴勒莫时，她的父亲Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile58岁，母亲Beatrice of Rethel24岁。她于1186年1月27日与Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1198年11月27日在她的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫。

nameMeanings.name: Costanza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Sal, Vito, Rocco, Santo, Francesco, Ignazio, Luigi, Nino, Agostino, Benedetto.
Italian: from the female personal name Costanza, from Latin Constantia (see Constance ).

variants.name: Constance
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Costanza von Hauteville was born on 2 November 1154, in Palermo, Two Sicilies, her father, Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile, was 58 and her mother, Beatrice of Rethel, was 24. She married Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs on 27 January 1186, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 27 November 1198, in her hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Costanza von Hauteville est née le 2 novembre 1154, à Palermo, Regno delle Due Sicilie, son père, Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Beatrice of Rethel, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs le 27 janvier 1186, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1198, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Costanza von Hauteville am 2. November 1154 in Palermo, Regno delle Due Sicilie geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile 58 und ihre Mutter Beatrice of Rethel 24. Sie hat am 27. Januar 1186 in Milano, Lombardei, Italien Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. November 1198 im Alter von 44 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Costanza von Hauteville è nata il il 2 novembre 1154 nel Palermo, Regno delle Due Sicilie, sua padre, Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Beatrice of Rethel, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs il 27 gennaio 1186, nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 novembre 1198, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Costanza von Hautevilleが1154年11月2日にレグノ デル ダ シシリープアラーモで生まれた時，父Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicileは58歳，母Beatrice of Rethelは24歳であった。1186年1月27日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノでHeinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1198年11月27日に故郷で44歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Costanza von Hauteville(이)가 1154년 11월 2일 레뇰 데 드 시실리 파일모에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice of Rethel(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1186년 1월 27일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1198년 11월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모에 묻혔다.

mn.2 November 1154–27 November 1198: 1154 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 2–1198 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 27

pt.2 November 1154–27 November 1198: 2 de novembro de 1154–27 de novembro de 1198
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Costanza von Hauteville nasceu em 2 de novembro de 1154, em Palermo, Regno delle Due Sicilie, seu pai, Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice of Rethel, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs em 27 de janeiro de 1186, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1198, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Costanza von Hauteville родилась 2 ноября 1154 г. в местности пеилирмо, регно делл ду сисили, её отцу по имени Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice of Rethel, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs 27 января 1186 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 ноября 1198 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия.

sm.from 1197 to 1198: mai le 1197 e o'o I le 1198

es.2 November 1154–27 November 1198: 2 de noviembre de 1154–27 de noviembre de 1198
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Costanza von Hauteville nació el 2 de noviembre de 1154, en Palermo, Regno delle Due Sicilie, su papá, Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Beatrice of Rethel, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Heinrich VI. von Hohenstaufen Kaiser des Heiligen Römischen Reichs el 27 de enero de 1186, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1198, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.
